summary: Completed testing of PMSModule.js refactoring (4366→3030 lines). All extracted dialog components are properly imported and working. PMS page loads correctly after refactoring with all tabs functional (Front Desk, Housekeeping, Rooms, Bookings). Settings page loads without crash - ROLE_LABELS bug fix still working. Dashboard loads with stats (Total Rooms, Occupancy Rate, etc.).

issues: Bookings show 'Invalid Date' for check-in/check-out - appears to be data issue with test data, not a code issue

critical_code_review_comments: PMSModule.js refactoring properly extracted 8+ dialog components to /app/frontend/src/components/pms/
All extracted components use proper imports: useTranslation, UI components, axios, toast
Components follow consistent pattern: Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription
Named exports used for RoomBlockDialogs.js (RoomBlockCreateDialog, RoomBlockViewDialog)
Default exports used for other dialog components
All components properly use t() for translations
context_for_next_testing_agent: PMSModule.js refactoring testing complete. All dialog components extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/pms/ are working correctly. PMS tabs (Front Desk, Housekeeping, Rooms, Bookings) all load without errors. Settings page ROLE_LABELS fix verified. Dashboard stats visible.
passed_tests: PMS page loads correctly after refactoring
Front Desk tab loads with Today's Arrivals, Departures, In-House Guests, Occupancy Prediction, Guest Patterns
Housekeeping tab loads with Due Out, Stayovers, Arrivals sections and task counts
Rooms tab loads with 30 rooms displaying status badges (available, occupied, dirty, cleaning)
Bookings tab loads with 9 bookings and summary stats
Tab switching works correctly between all PMS tabs
Settings page loads without crash (ROLE_LABELS bug fix still working)
Settings Team tab shows role labels correctly (Admin, Front Desk, Housekeeping, Finance, Sales)
Settings Available Roles section shows all role badges
Dashboard loads with Welcome message and stats (Total Rooms: 30, Occupancy Rate: 33.3%, Today Check-ins: 20, Total Guests: 50)
Dashboard Analytics section shows Occupancy Trend and Revenue Trend charts
No console errors or page errors during navigation
All extracted dialog components properly imported in PMSModule.js
